title: Quick Math Strategies for Kids

segments.narration: Can you solve problems faster with just your mind? Let's find out!
Using rounding to estimate makes calculations easier and quicker!
Try estimating 49 plus 28 by rounding to 50 and 30 first.
Great job! Remember to use these techniques every day to get faster!

teacherNotes: Encourage students to share their experiences using estimation in everyday tasks.
